title: angelica japonica var. japonica
intro: Angelica japonica var. japonica, also known as Japanese angelica or Japanese angelica root, is a variety of the Angelica plant that is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Japanese angelica root include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Japanese angelica root can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in traditional cooking and herbal remedies.
